creator: tedm@ipinc.net
text:
I forgot to mention, if this patch is applied that
/usr/ports/comms/hcfmdm/Makefile

will have to be changed also:


.if ${OSVERSION} >= 700000
BROKEN= Does not compile at 7.x or higher
.endif

will need to go to


.if ${OSVERSION} >= 800000
BROKEN= Does not compile at 8.x or higher
.endif

due to the tty changes in 8.0

Ted
